task_completion.description: Add the internal TLE source URL to GPredict
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Preferences or TLE Update settings window is open, showing 'http://localhost:8080/techsat.txt' added to the list of TLE network sources.

task_completion.description: Update the satellite database to ingest the new TLE
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status dialog showing a successful TLE network update, OR the satellite 'TECHSAT-1' (or ID 47438) is visible in the GPredict satellite search or selection list, proving the database was updated.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Ottawa_Lab' ground station with specific coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Ground Station' or 'New Ground Station' dialog in GPredict is visible, showing Name: 'Ottawa_Lab', Latitude: 45.4215 (N), Longitude: -75.6972 (or 75.6972 W), and Altitude: 70.
A new module tab, window, or configuration dialog within the GPredict interface is explicitly named 'LEOP_Tracking'.

task_completion.description: Assign 'TECHSAT-1' and 'Ottawa_Lab' to the tracking module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'LEOP_Tracking' module is open and active, displaying 'Ottawa_Lab' as the selected ground station (usually in the module header or settings) and showing 'TECHSAT-1' being tracked on the map, radar, or satellite list.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GPredict GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict graphical user interface is open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof results in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates, TLE URL, and module names are entered into actual GPredict dialog boxes, not typed into a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The tracking module displays genuine software rendering
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'LEOP_Tracking' module shows the standard GPredict world map, radar view, or data tables, confirming it is a real tracking module and not a mocked image or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The TLE URL to be added is exactly 'http://localhost:8080/techsat.txt'. The ground station 'Ottawa_Lab' must have Latitude 45.4215 N, Longitude 75.6972 W (often represented as -75.6972), and Altitude 70m. The tracking module must be named 'LEOP_Tracking' and must track satellite 'TECHSAT-1' (NORAD ID 47438).
